T20 World Cup 2026: 7 Powerful Moments from Gautam Gambhir’s Speech

T20 World Cup 2026: 7 Powerful Moments from Gautam Gambhir’s Speech

Former Indian cricketer Gautam Gambhir delivered a passionate and motivational speech ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026.

His words focused on determination, national pride, and the importance of teamwork as India prepares for another global cricket challenge.

The speech quickly resonated with fans and players alike.
